findings.finding: Command center renders old artifact command center before the newer revenue/unit action surfaces.
findings.evidence: RossCommandCenterSurface appears before ActionFirstDashboard and UnitWorkSnapshotPanel.
findings.recommendation: Either promote current unit/revenue action to the top or clearly label the old artifact section as Legacy Build Artifact.

findings.finding: Revenue dashboard and unit work currently agree on follow-up/close as the business action, but they render in separate sections.

evidence.revenueAction: Follow up on real ShopiFixer offer and close payment.
unitActions: Follow up on real ShopiFixer offer and close payment.
Wait for payment or follow up before starting fix delivery.
Use schema foundation to connect Ask, Operate, Memory, Opportunity, Issue, Delivery, and Outcome layers.
Follow up on real ShopiFixer offer and close payment.

findings.recommendation: Merge into one primary action block instead of separate competing panels.

findings.finding: Unit panel picks the first sorted item by local UI priority rules, not a canonical priority score.
findings.evidence: getPriority() is defined inside UI component.
findings.recommendation: Move priority decision into a unit snapshot builder/engine, not the UI.

findings.finding: Background work is collapsed, which is good.
findings.evidence: UnitWorkSnapshotPanel uses details/summary for background work.

findings.finding: Command center includes lead queue after revenue/unit panels, making the page long and mixed-purpose.
findings.evidence: LeadQueue is embedded directly in command-center page.
findings.recommendation: Command center should show lead summary and link to Lead Command, not full lead table.

findings.finding: Two sections ask versions of the same primary question.
findings.evidence: ActionFirstDashboard and UnitWorkSnapshotPanel both frame the next action.
findings.recommendation: Create one unified primary action section driven by unit/revenue truth.

findings.finding: Navigation appears owned by nested components rather than a single page shell.
findings.evidence: OperatorNav is inside RossCommandCenterSurface, not clearly page-level.
findings.recommendation: Create one OperatorShell so every page has consistent navigation and layout.

recommended_next_move: Build a canonical primary_action_snapshot_v1 from dashboard + unit truth, then make command center top section consume that single source instead of old artifact truth.
